text.title: AI Accessibility Automation 2026 Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed when applying ai-accessibility-automation-2026. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Team ships 'green CI' but AT users fail every flow.
antipattern.fix: Wire AT testing cadence + require pass for the 30–40 % scanners miss.

antipattern.symptom: AI triage alone misses deterministic semantic issues.
antipattern.fix: Run scanners first; AI triages output.

antipattern.symptom: Critical contrast failures appear in reports but never block merge.
Compliance audit asks for 6-month history; logs purged at 7 days.
